name: contributionScore
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.rankings === undefined || output.result.rankings.every(r => Number.isFinite(r.totalScore))
output.ok === false || output.result.rankings === undefined || output.result.rankings.every(r => Number.isFinite(r.contributions))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (CollabActionPanel.actContrib channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). Empty contributions → { message } empty-shape (no rankings). Else weight by type (code 3 / design 2.5 / document 2 / review 1.5 / discussion 1 / admin 0.5, else 1); score = round(weight*quality*100); per-person total = sum(score*count); rankings sorted desc by totalScore; topContributor = rankings[0].name; totalContributions = sum(count). Fail-CLOSED numerics: quality = clamp01(finiteNum(quality,0.7)||0.7) and count = max(1, round(finiteNum(count,1))||1) so 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'12abc' fall to the 0.7/1 defaults (parseFloat would have leaked Infinity into score, or accepted '12abc' as 12). Result card renders topContributor/totalContributions/rankings[].{name,totalScore,contributions} EXACTLY (verified field-for-field against CollabActionPanel.tsx 2026-06-28).
